requirement.title: --no-isolate Flag for eval run
requirement.description: eval run accepts --no-isolate to run trials without isolation settings.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: "arc eval run scenario-name --no-isolate" runs trials with isolated=false. REQ-F009
Without --no-isolate, eval run behaves as before (isolated=true). REQ-N002

requirement.title: --plugin-dir Flag for eval run and eval ab
requirement.description: eval run and eval ab accept --plugin-dir to specify local plugin directory.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: "arc eval run scenario-name --plugin-dir /path" passes pluginDir to runTrial(). REQ-F009
"arc eval ab scenario-name --plugin-dir /path" passes pluginDir to treatment trials (baseline remains isolated). REQ-F009
--plugin-dir value overrides scenario's Plugin Dir field. REQ-F009

requirement.title: --max-turns Flag for eval run and eval ab
requirement.description: eval run and eval ab accept --max-turns to set multi-turn limit.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: "arc eval run scenario-name --max-turns 10" passes maxTurns to runTrial(). REQ-F009
--max-turns value overrides scenario's Max Turns field. REQ-F009
